description_long: This is a modern, long-distance coach bus with a streamlined, aerodynamic body and a predominantly white exterior. The bus features large, tinted side windows that run almost the entire length of the vehicle, providing ample visibility for passengers. The front of the bus is characterized by a wide, dark windshield and side mirrors extending outward for enhanced driver visibility. The rear of the bus is relatively flat, with red tail lights and subtle ventilation grilles. The bus rides on six wheels, with two axles at the rear and one at the front, and has multiple passenger doors along the side. The overall design suggests a focus on comfort, efficiency, and urban or intercity passenger transport.
description: A sleek, white coach bus with large tinted windows, multiple passenger doors, and a streamlined, modern design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the flat back, red tail lights, and subtle ventilation grilles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long row of large, tinted windows, passenger doors, and six wheels.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the wide, dark windshield and protruding side mirrors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar window arrangement and visible rear ventilation grilles.
attribute_window_arrangement: Large, rectangular, evenly spaced tinted windows run along both sides of the bus, separated by narrow vertical pillars, with a consistent size and shape throughout.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: A small, circular logo is visible on the rear center of the bus, but the text is not readable.
